home.title: Catch | The event before the match
home.description: Catch turns curated singles events into real dating context. Choose a hosted event, show up, catch privately, and match with people you actually met.
home.twitterDescription: Curated singles events become real dating context.

host.title: Catch for Hosts | Host better singles events
host.description: Catch helps hosts publish curated singles events, manage admission and waitlists, run live facilitation, and turn real attendance into post-event connections.
host.twitterDescription: Event setup, admission, waitlists, live facilitation, check-in, and aggregate post-event reporting for hosts.

organizers.title: Organizer Search | Catch
organizers.description: Search Catch organizer profiles by name, city, format, and review signal.
organizers.twitterDescription: Search Catch organizer and club profiles.

claim.title: Claim your organizer listing | Catch
claim.description: Find an unclaimed organizer profile, verify ownership, and request access to Catch host tools.
claim.twitterDescription: Claim an organizer profile and unlock Catch host tools.

not_found.title: Page not found | Catch
not_found.description: This Catch page does not exist. Search organizer profiles, browse the member site, or explore host tools.
not_found.twitterDescription: Search organizer profiles, browse the member site, or explore Catch host tools.
